Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Reaper]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The Judges agreed Ozmanthus should be given the mantle of the Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Ozriel intended to call his new official division of the Abidan Reapers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — The Reaper is identified as the one who has arrived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Eithan unleashes the power of the Reaper.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 1''' — Makiel placed seals on the Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 20''' — The Reaper struck Amorenthus.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Yerin enters the mentality of the Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin is the apprentice of the Reaper.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Reaper stands over the Court of Seven like a proud hen.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Mercy's armor is the black armor of the Reapers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — The Reapers are a group of Abidan whose powers do not depend on the presence of the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The success of Lindon's mission will establish the reputation of the Reapers among the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — Ozriel sent a baby Reaper to Threshold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper is an agent assigned by Ozriel to reclaim the Iteration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper is a figure of black-and-white with black armor, black hair, and black eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper has a white badge on his chest and burning white circle irises.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper is the newest member of the Reapers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper's base power is estimated to be comparable to a three-star Wolf.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper's specialty is suggested to be stealth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reaper launched a mental assault on Cirian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Reapers are considered a bad idea by everyone on the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The Reapers are a group disdained by the Abidan of the Wolf Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Reaper intervention creates strange deviations.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
